/usr/bin/clang++-18 -g CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/HttpConnection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wechat.dir/Sources/LogicSystem.cpp.o -o bin/wechat  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 -ljsoncpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
